# Crypto-Jews

> NOTE: This site is currently a placeholder (index.html is empty). This
> llms.txt describes the intended mission so AI crawlers and the sibling sites
> have context; it will be expanded once site content is added.

> Crypto-Jews is intended to focus on the Anusim / Converso ("New Christian")
> community — descendants of Iberian Jews forcibly converted or driven into
> hidden practice from the late 15th century — and on Sephardic genealogy and
> the paths by which descendants reconnect with Jewish heritage.

## About (intended)

- Focus: Anusim / Converso / Bnei Anusim history and identity, and Sephardic genealogy.
- Status: placeholder — no live content or forms yet.

## Related initiatives

Crypto-Jews is one of six independent sibling nonprofit sites:

- [get-out-now.org](https://get-out-now.org/) — diaspora relocation / Law of Return guidance.
- [interfaith-sanctuary.org](https://interfaith-sanctuary.org/) — a non-denominational interfaith sanctuary.
- [thelastdate.org](https://thelastdate.org/) — nonprofit matchmaking initiative.
- [projectshreeram.org](https://projectshreeram.org/) — Hindu–Jewish and India–Israel relations.
- [1in56million.org](https://1in56million.org/) — British-Israelite / genealogy research.
